case_title: 657 MISSION STREET BUILDING PARTNERSHIP vs. RUDIKOFF, ROGER et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 657 MISSION STREET BUILDING PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT RUDIKOFF, ROGER DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-13-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-14-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-24-1994

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-13-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON APR-13-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAY-12-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-12-1994, CONTINUED TO MAY-26-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 APPEARANCE WAIVED IF JUDGMENT FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-26-1994, CONTINUED TO AUG-30-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 TO BE DISMISSED BY 8/30/95. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-30-1995, CONTINUED TO SEP-29-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR DISMISSAL OR STATUS OF CASE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
